title: Alert
description: Displays a callout for important user-facing messages with optional actions.

manual.title: Copy the component code
manual.description: Create a new file and paste the alert component code.

usage.import: import { Alert, AlertAction, AlertDescription, AlertTitle } from '@repo/components';

examples.title: Default
examples.description: Use the default alert variant for neutral information.

examples.title: Destructive with Action
examples.description: Use destructive alerts for errors and pair with an action.

examples.title: Success
examples.description: Use success alerts to confirm a completed action.
